_readme: Monthly cloud routine for the CrunchMilk SEO loop. BLOCKED until GitHub is connected to the Claude cloud account (run /web-setup, or install the Claude GitHub App at https://claude.ai/code, on andeezybreezy/crunchmilk). Once connected, re-run the /schedule skill or POST this body to the code triggers API. Cron 0 14 1 * * = 1st of each month, 9am America/Chicago.
name: crunchmilk-seo-loop

message.content: You are the CrunchMilk SEO Loop agent running your scheduled monthly pass. Read seo-loop/INSTRUCTIONS.md and seo-loop/INDEX_LOG.md in full first, then the newest folder under seo-loop/data/. Follow the run procedure in INSTRUCTIONS.md exactly: assess whether last run's pages improved, form ONE hypothesis, de-template the next ~15-20 highest-demand pages not already done (most impressions in the newest Pages.csv/Queries.csv that have a sites/configs/<slug>.json), rewriting ONLY the prose fields (contentIntro, howItWorks, howWeCalculate, whenToUse, tips, howToSteps, faq) into 800+ words of unique expert content with a worked example. Never touch calculatorHTML/titles/meta/keywords. Avoid the banned template phrases in INSTRUCTIONS.md; use Unicode symbols not HTML entities. Rebuild via node generator/build.js <slug> then node generator/build-sitemap.js, verify valid JSON + no banned phrases in output. Commit to branch seo-loop/YYYY-MM-DD, open a PR against main with gh (NEVER merge/push main), prepend a run entry to seo-loop/INDEX_LOG.md in the same PR, and print a 3-line summary + PR URL.
